title: VWO Login PRD
content: Functional requirements for VWO Login: 1. Username/Password validation. 2. Remember me session handling. 3. 2FA for admin accounts.

title: Auth API Logs
content: POST /api/login 401 Unauthorized - Invalid credentials. POST /api/login 200 OK - Session created successfully.
